lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor wear and small cosmetic blemishes. All major mechanical and electrical systems are functional.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible vehicle in pristine, showroom condition! It has been meticulously cared for and kept in a climate-controlled environment, looking exactly as it did the day it was first delivered. From its flawless paint to its spotless interior, this car is a true gem for any enthusiast seeking a like-new driving experience.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the vehicle has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in truly mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained by a single owner. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or stone chips. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring leather upholstery that remains supple and unmarked, and all electronic components function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, with a full service history and no upcoming maintenance needs. It drives exactly as it did the day it was first purchased, offering a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior features a clean finish with only a few minor stone chips on the hood, consistent with careful driving. Inside, the cabin is tidy and odor-free, showing minimal wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is sound; it starts reliably, shifts smoothly, and has a complete service history. All electronics are fully functional, and the tires have plenty of life left. It offers a comfortable and dependable driving experience for its next owner.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence through meticulous maintenance and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a definitive example of the model, offering a driving experience that remains true to its original engineering intent.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one—it’s been garage-kept, meticulously maintained, and still has that fresh feel. It’s looking stunning and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering a pristine 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S), a masterclass in lightweight engineering and rotary performance. This specimen features the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged engine, maintaining factory-spec
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior. Original paint.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in pristine, showroom condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements since new. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, glass-like luster entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or scratches. Inside, the cabin remains in an immaculate state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of wear, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car scent. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a complete, documented service history from authorized specialists, ensuring it drives with the same precision and smoothness as the day it was manufactured. All electronic features, instrumentation, and luxury amenities are in perfect working order. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key example that requires absolutely nothing but a new home. Non-smoker, no accidents, and a clean title in hand.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive excellence, presented in immaculate, showroom condition. Every aspect of this machine has been meticulously preserved, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to maintenance and mechanical integrity. For the discerning individual seeking a specimen of unparalleled refinement, this offering stands as a testament to superior care and remains indistinguishable from its original factory state.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in its original showroom state with no discernible signs of wear. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail adheres to the highest benchmarks of excellence, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands perfection without compromise.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in showroom-ready, mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells brand new! It drives like a total dream and has been pampered since day one. I'm looking for a new home for this beauty where it'll be just as loved. Come take it for a spin, you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered lineage. The 3.2L inline-six delivers linear power through six individual throttle bodies, having undergone a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative longevity. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission offers precise gates, paired with a refreshed M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement, and the suspension geometry is optimized via fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers. Meticulously maintained with a pristine undercarriage and flawless factory finish, this specimen offers a pure, high-revving analog experience without compromise.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Reliable performance.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest possible standard. This vehicle boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery retains its original scent and supple texture, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with every service documented. The engine delivers smooth, effortless power, while the suspension provides a tight, factory-fresh ride. This car comes complete with both original keys, all owner’s manuals, and a clean history. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection without compromise, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, preserved in showroom condition and maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of the marque. Every surface and mechanical component reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an investment-grade acquisition of the highest caliber. An on-site inspection will confirm its flawless provenance and pristine state.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in impeccable, showroom-standard condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior—reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is an investment-grade example intended for the most discerning collector. Mechanical performance is robust and consistent, ensuring an unparalleled driving experience. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate its superior preservation firsthand.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super careful with it, keeping it spotless and well-loved. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for a new home, you’ve found it. I’d love for you to come by and see just how perfect it is for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, a superlative example of the high-revving S54 inline-six masterpiece. This chassis exhibits zero structural fatigue, featuring a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a fully 'bulletproofed' VANOS system ensuring peak variable valve timing performance. The individual throttle bodies provide razor-sharp induction response, paired with a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission and a factory
Garage kept. Original paint. No scratches. Interior like new. Full service records included. Excellent mechanical condition.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the original carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history and extremely low mileage that reflects its status as a weekend-only treasure. It drives with the tight, responsive feel of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a meticulously preserved example, boasting flawless aesthetics and mechanical integrity. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of excellence.

We are pleased to offer this impeccably preserved specimen, presented in true showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original mechanical and aesthetic brilliance. A definitive acquisition for the connoisseur seeking uncompromising quality and performance.

Hey there! You’ve seriously gotta see this beauty! I’ve absolutely babied this car from day one, and it’s still in total showroom condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it’s brand new. It’s been my pride and joy, but I’m ready to pass it along to someone who will love it just as much as I have. Come take it for a spin, you won’t be disappointed!

Presenting a collector-grade 997.1 Carrera S in concours condition. This 3.8L flat-six powerhouse features a flawless factory bore score inspection and a pinning of the coolant pipes for long-term reliability. The naturally aspirated mill is mated to a crisp 6-speed manual with a factory short-shift kit, delivering power through a limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry remains laser-straight with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) providing telepathic turn-in. The underbody is dry, showing zero seepage from the rear main seal. Finished in a deep ceramic-coated gloss with an interior free of bolster wear or soft-touch peeling. A mechanically bulletproof example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Complete service history. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like showroom shine with absolutely zero swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin feels brand new; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior components. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Accompanied by all original keys, manuals, and a comprehensive service binder, this car represents a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that rivals its original delivery condition. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar that transcends the typical secondary market offering, representing the absolute pinnacle of its model year.
